step_rationale: Niacin metabolite downregulated in myocarditis; reflects NAD+ metabolism disruption in injured myocardium.
mechanism: Nicotinic acid metabolite depletion in myocardial injury marks impaired NAD+ cycling and cardiomyocyte bioenergetic stress.

references.title: Metabolic Profiling Reveals Diagnostic Biomarkers for Distinguishing Myocarditis From Acute Myocardial Infarction.
